response:
<<Microsoft AI Ethics Guide>>

Section 1
Microsoft values trust.
Trust builds systems.
Systems need care.
Care guides design.
Design shapes future.
Future holds hope.
Hope drives change.
Change requires rules.
Rules ensure safety.
Safety protects users.

Section 2
Ethics form core.
Core defines action.
Action needs clarity.
Clarity avoids harm.
Harm must stop.
Stop means pause.
Pause allows thought.
Thought leads wisdom.
Wisdom guides choices.
Choices shape outcomes.

Section 3
AI needs fairness.
Fairness treats all.
All deserve respect.
Respect means dignity.
Dignity honors people.
People need privacy.
Privacy keeps secrets.
Secrets stay safe.
Safe data matters.
Matters for growth.

Section 4
Transparency builds trust.
Trust needs facts.
Facts show truth.
Truth reveals logic.
Logic explains results.
Results inform users.
Users gain power.
Power demands control.
Control ensures choice.
Choice respects freedom.

Section 5
Accountability defines roles.
Roles set duties.
Duties require action.
Action needs review.
Review finds errors.
Errors get fixed.
Fixed systems work.
Work creates value.
Value serves society.
Society needs help.

Section 6
Safety is vital.
Vital means first.
First comes health.
Health needs protection.
Protection stops abuse.
Abuse harms lives.
Lives matter most.
Most need care.
Care prevents danger.
Danger must end.

Section 7
Inclusion opens doors.
Doors let in.
In brings many.
Many share views.
Views expand thought.
Thought sparks ideas.
Ideas fuel progress.
Progress lifts all.
All join teams.
Teams build tools.

Section 8
Guidance helps teams.
Teams follow paths.
Paths lead far.
Far reaches goals.
Goals define success.
Success brings peace.
Peace calms minds.
Minds create good.
Good serves world.
World needs love.
